Note: Note: These winds were not converted from Magnetic to True.
Their courses and bearings are given as True, so I assume the dins are as well.
Note: After 22 February, the positional data becomes quite vague, with only noon positions
logged, and only whole degrees are given. Generally these seem to be given to the nearest
degree, but there seem to be cases when they are truncated. So, 50 59N might be logged
There are some days when either no courses are given, or courses are just logged as V.
The data for this voyage have been saved, but only data up to 22 Feb have been calculated.
